prepared_text:
AR 
October 23, 2024 
 
BSE Limited 
Phiroze Jeejeebhoy Towers, 
 
Dalal Street, 
Mumbai 400 001 
Security Code: 500878 
National Stock Exchange of India Limited 
Exchange Plaza, 
Bandra Kurla Complex, Bandra (East), 
Mumbai 400 051 
Symbol: CEATLTD 
NCD Symbol: CL25, CL26 
CP Listed ISIN: INE482A14CR5, INE482A14CT1, 
INE482A14CS3, INE482A14CV7, INE482A14CU9, 
INE482A14CW5, INE482A14CX3, INE482A14CZ8, 
INE482A14CY1 
 
Dear Sir/Madam, 
 
Sub: Q2 FY25 Results Earnings Call - Transcript 
 
In continuation of our letter(s) dated October 9, 2024,  October 17, 2024 and October 19, 2024, please 
note that the transcript of the earnings call held on Friday, October 18, 2024 at 4.00 pm (IST) for 
Unaudited Financial Results of the Company for the period ended September 30, 2024 has been made 
available on the website of the Company at https://www.ceat.com/investors/financial-performance.html  
 
This is for your information and dissemination purpose. 
 
Kindly take the same on record. 
 
Thanking you, 
 
Yours faithfully,  
 
For CEAT Limited 
 
 
 
Gaurav Tongia 
Company Secretary  
 
Encl: As above 
GAURAV 
TONGIA
Digitally signed 
by GAURAV 
TONGIA 
Date: 2024.10.23 
13:38:21 +05'30'
